name: translate_text
description: Translate a single text string from a source language to one or more target languages. If the source language is not specified, it will be auto-detected. Supports 100+ languages including all major world languages and many regional ones.

parameters.name: texts
parameters.description: Array of text strings to translate. For single translation, provide an array with one element.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Array of target language codes to translate into. Example: ['es', 'fr'] for Spanish and French.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Source language code. If omitted, the language will be auto-detected. Example: 'en' for English.
